entity.summary: Decentralized exchange component of Lista DAO providing smart-routed token swaps and liquidity pools across BNB Chain and Ethereum deployments.
entity.notes: Current first-party swap surface exposes Lista's Smart Swap exchange interface. Current independently maintained metrics identify Lista DEX as a distinct swap protocol with non-zero DEX volume, TVL, fees, and revenue across BNB Chain and Ethereum. HEI models the exchange component separately from Lista DAO's lending, stablecoin, liquid-staking, and RWA products. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Lista Smart Swap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes Lista's Smart Swap exchange surface for routed token swaps.

evidence.title: Lista DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume together with TVL, fees, and revenue across BNB Chain and Ethereum, supporting active classification.
